name: Serious Seeds
description:
[p]
The breeder behind Serious Seeds, Simon, is responsible for the material sold by the seed bank. He studied biology at one of the universities in Amsterdam and was always a non smoker. (Tabacco, and therefore also marihuana because in Holland it is common practice to mix the latter with tabacco and roll a joint.) He only discovered the merits of smoking pure marihuana after his study while travelling through Africa in 1986. From that moment on he started collecting seeds. Back in Holland he immediately started growing those seeds out for personal pleasure crossing what he thought were the best plants seemed a natural follow up. Contacts with other growers gave him access to different plants from which he also selected the best ones. The genetic background of this material was not always clear.
[/p]
[p]
Simon taught biology at a highschool when Alan Dronkers asked him to come and work at Sensi Seeds. It was quite a carreer change to do that but he never felt sorry about it. After some time working for Sensi he left and started a seed company with some American pot refugees. That year (1994) the AK-47 as well as the Chronoc won prices at the American Cannabis Cup festival in Amsterdam. That first seed company with the Americanshowever fell apart soon, and in 1995 Serious Seeds was grounded. It has always been a Serious policy to have the products grown from the different seeds available to try out in some of the best coffeeshops in Amsterdam. The "Greenhouse" is one of those coffeeshops which carries Serious' products to smoke from the start in 1995 to this date. Greenhouse coffeeshop won a Cannabis Cup in 1995 with the Kalimist grown by Serious Seeds. In 1996 another famous Amsterdam coffeeshop the "Dampkring" won the Overall Cup at that years Cannabis Cup with the newest Serious strain White Russian. Another serious shop from the early days is the Blue Bird and recently also the Dread Rock, they really sell what is listed instead of anything under an often asked for name.
[/p]
[p]
Serious has always been a small company, and prefers to stay like that.
[/p]
[p]
Shamelessly stolen from [url=https://seedfinder.eu][i]SeedFinder.eu[/i][/url].
[/p]

ak47.name: AK-47
ak47.description:
[h]Genetics[/h]
[p]
The genetics of the AK-47 is the result of a complete and complex work of selection and then crossing between the most known landraces from around the world: Colombian, Mexican, Thai & Afghan.
[/p]

[h]Taste and Aroma[/h]
[p]
The AK-47 weed is definitely worth a detour! Its base tone of spicy, but also sweet citrus from the famous AK-47 is instantly noticeable! And to top it off, the terpene-rich profile has incredible gustatory flavors! We don't have to convince growers who have known the classic taste of AK-47 for years.
[/p]

[h]Cultivation of AK-47 seeds[/h]
[p]
This AK-47 variety, which can be described as "strong" both for its genetics and its terpene potency, can be grown indoors as well as outdoors. Its average height makes it preferable to keep the apex, which will form a large central bud. Its growth is vigorous and takes the shape of a Christmas tree. It doesn't require much attention, which makes it a perfect genetics for beginners.
[/p]
[p]
Simon describes the AK-47 as follows: "This easy-to-grow plant is a living legend and our most popular. Medium-sized, produces good yields quite quickly, producing compact buds, not too leafy, shining with a layer of resin crystals."
[/p]
The AK-47 has a high calyx/leaf ratio typical of sativa, meaning lots of flowers and only a few leaves. The unique size of the AK calyx tends to be unusually large, resulting in fat clusters grouping together very decoratively and densely, contributing to the trademark appearance of the AK-47. 
[p]

[h]Effects[/p]
[p]
The strong potency of AK-47 weed and its lasting effect contributes to its reputation! A mentally and physically soothing effect that will delight you during recreational and relaxing moments.
[/p]
[p]
Often nicknamed the “one hit wonder”, a single puff of this electric plant is enough to feel an intense but pleasant high.
[p]

[h]In a few numbers[/h]
[p]
[ul]
[li] [b]Flowering period:[/b] 53 to 63 days or 8 to 9 weeks [/li]
[li][b]THC-CBD levels:[/b] 20%-1%[/li]
[li][b]Harvest potential:[/b] between 350 and 500G/M2
[/ul]

[h]In a few words[/h]
[ul]
[li]  The AK-47 alone gathers the main genetic characteristics generally sought after by a grower: good yield and a good smell![/li]
[li] It will produce compact buds glittering with trichomes, satisfying for both beginner and experienced green thumbs.[/li]
[li]It is a mainly sativa cross.[/li]
[li]In its record, AK47 has no less than 27 Cups including 7 “HT Cannabis Cup”[/li]
[li]An independent laboratory test showed 21.5% THC in samples from the 1999 Cannabis Cup, the highest of all entries that year. [/li]
[/ul]

[h]Additional Information:[/h]
[ul]
[li]The genetics of AK-47 weed, making it rich in Trichomes, makes it a perfect variety for extractions and ensures a good yield. [/li]
[li]Serious Seeds also worked on a well-known “mostly indica” cross: the White Russian. A cross between an AK-47 and a White Widow.[/li]
[li]The AK-47 is the basis of many crosses subsequently made following its success by many breeders, making this variety a genetic pillar such as White Widow and Jack Herer.[/li]
[/ul]
[h]A bit of history:[/h]
[p]
There are a few classic varieties in the world of extra potent marijuana that have been around for a very long time, constantly fascinating growers and smokers with their superb qualities, and having reached legendary status. The AK-47 variety from Serious Seeds is certainly one of these exceptional evergreen strains. For Simon, owner and breeder of Serious Seeds, finding the unique genetic profile of AK-47 was the rare case of a "stroke of luck" that all cannabis seed breeders dream of.
[/p]
[p]
Already in 1992, after testing thousands of experimental plants from different lineages, he finally achieved his goal of creating a high-quality sativa/indica variety with excellent overall properties and a lot of charisma - the legendary AK-47 weed was born.
[/p]

auto-ak47.name: Auto AK-47
auto-ak47.description:
At last our multi award winning AK-47 strain in an autoflowering version.

The plants will finally reach a height of 75-100 cm. Quite strong smelling plants with full big buds, covered in crystals and a sweetish, fruity, bit lemony and a bit spicey odour.

Strong in effect, THC only, no CBD. Medicinally grown plants can be used for chronic pains, anxiety and as mood enhancer. Can be grown anywhere indoors or outdoors.

auto-white-russian.name: Auto White Russian
auto-white-russian.description:
Our first autoflowering variety. An easy plant to grow everywhere. Good for beginners and great for outdoors on (city) balconies or small gardens. The more sun or artificial light they receive the better the results.

Bushy, sturdy with side branches and vigorous growth. Every 3 years or so, we produce a new batch of seeds. The next generation is usually a little better than the old one. This means autoflowering White Russian is now better than ever before.

Plants grow quite uniform to a final height of 70 to 90 cm, sometimes more. The end height and yield depends mostly on how much light (or sun) a plant gets in its life. Starting to grow first in small pots keeps the plants small. We recommend planting the seeds straight into the final container or pot. Most plants grow good sized buds and can yield 60 to 80 grams or more.

The more light they receive (in strength and/or in hours) during their life, the better the final result will be. All plants will be beautifully covered in a layer of trichomes. Most plants will finish between 70-75 days after germination, while few need more time, up to 80 days. The potency of Autoflowering White Russian #1 (the first batch)was tested by CANNA lab in Spain and was with 17% THC the highest tested autoflowering strain. Pleasant smell and taste like the White Russian strain. Everybody can now grow this great SERIOUS CLASSIC STRAIN in its AUTO-FEM FORM!

bubble-gum.name: Bubble Gum
bubble-gum.description:
+ **Outdoor harvest date:** middle - end of October
+ **Indoor clone grow time:** 7 - 14 days
+ **Indoor Flowering Period:** 56 - 63 days
+ **Indoor yield:** 300-450 g/m²

Bubble Gum is a medium tall, usually not too branchy (sometimes stretchy) plant, producing compact, crystal covered buds. Originally the Bubble Gum was developed by growers in Indiana, USA. From there the genetics moved to New England and eventually Holland. It took many generations to finally produce this stable Bubble Gum, with the characteristic, sweet smell (truly resembling a typical bubble gum taste) and euphoric high; the original trademarks of this famous strain. The only inbred strain (no F1 hybrid) in the Serious menu.

cbd-chronic.name: CBD-Chronic
cbd-chronic.description:
Unser ertragreichster Chronic wurde gekreuzt mit Remedy, einer extrem CBD-reichen Sorte, in einer Zusammenarbeit mit dem CBD-Crew. Die Kombination wurde in Spanien im Labor getestet und ALLE 10 Proben hatten ein 1:1 Verhältnis von THC:CBD. Die durchschnittliche Potenz betrug 5,4 % THC : 5,8 % CBD, mit der besten Pflanze, die 7,88 % THC und 6,93 % CBD erreichte! CBD-Chronic kann Spitzen-Erträge von bis zu 600 g/m2 produzieren und ist leicht zu züchten und zu klonen.

Sie entwickelt eine GROßE Haupt-Knospe mit wenigen Seitenästen. Diese erste rein medizinische CBD-Sorte von Serious Seeds ist ein Meilenstein, der es Patienten/Betreuern ermöglicht, große Mengen medizinischen Cannabis mit hohem CBD-Gehalt zu produzieren. Die Herstellung medizinischer Extrakte (z.B. Rick Simpson Öl) und Lotionen, Cremes oder Salben wird mit dieser Sorte viel einfacher gemacht. CBD-Chronic ist eine medizinische Sorte, von der wir Rückmeldungen erhalten haben, dass sie sehr gut geeignet sein könnte, um Symptome von z.B. Multipler Sklerose, Epilepsie, Tourette-Syndrom, Glaukom und Arthritis zu behandeln.

**CBD-Produkte sind keine Medikamente und können Krankheiten nicht diagnostizieren, behandeln oder heilen. Konsultieren Sie immer Ihren Arzt, bevor Sie ein neues Diätprogramm beginnen.**

cbd-warlock.name: CBD-Warlock
cbd-warlock.description:
Eine unserer geschmackvollsten Sorten, die Warlock-Sorte wurde gekreuzt mit Cannatonic, einer Sorte mit sehr hohem CBD-Gehalt, in Zusammenarbeit mit House of the Great Gardener aus Kanada. Die neue Kreuzung wurde in Kanada im Labor getestet und 9 von 24 Proben hatten ein 2:1 Verhältnis von THC:CBD. Die durchschnittliche Potenz lag bei ca. 8% THC : 4 % CBD, wobei die besten Pflanzen einen THC-Gehalt von 16,86% und einen CBD-Gehalt von 15,58% erreichten! 

Da wir eine Sorte unter unserer medizinischen Linie: SERIOUSLY MEDICAL nur dann auf den Markt bringen, wenn ALLE im Labor getesteten Proben mehr als 4% CBD enthalten, was hier bei 15 von 24 Proben der Fall ist, haben wir uns entschieden, diese neue Kreuzung als limitierte Edition zu verkaufen und weiterzuentwickeln. Der Warlock für diese Kreuzung ist ein beliebtes Medikament unter den Patienten der Vancouver Island Compassion Society (=VICS) und sie fragten nach einer CBD-reichen Version für Patienten, die weiterhin das köstliche süße und fruchtige Aroma dieser Pflanze wollen, aber eine weniger starke psychoaktive Wirkung. 

Die Herstellung von SEHR geschmackvollen medizinischen Extrakten (z.B. Rick Simpson Oil) und Lotionen, Cremes oder essbaren Produkten wird mit dieser Sorte viel einfacher. CBD-reicher Warlock ist eine medizinische Sorte, von der wir von Patienten gehört haben, dass sie gut geeignet ist, um die Symptome von z.B. chronischen Schmerzen, Multipler Sklerose, Epilepsie, Tourette-Syndrom, Glaukom, Arthritis und vielen weiteren zu behandeln. House of the Great Gardener gewann den ERSTEN Preis für CBD-reichen Warlock: 3. Platz in der Kategorie 'Peoples Choice' beim Bio-Cannabis-Cup 2016 auf Vancouver-Island, Kanada

chronic.name: Chronic
chronic.description:
+ **Indoor clone grow time:** 7 - 14 days
+ **Indoor flowering period:** 9-10 weeks
+ **Indoor yield:** 350-600 g/m²
+ **Outdoor harvest date:** middle - end of October

Improved in 2000. This is one of the larger yielding varieties, this medium height, not too dense plant is the perfect combination of good yield and excellent quality. Smokers that know and grow choose this plant for its combination of appearance and sweet smell. Grows a single huge central bud with few side branches. This strain does not respond well to topping. Mild, sweet smell develops while flowering, take care to dry thoroughly after harvest to maintain this subtle fragrance.

double-dutch.name: Double Dutch
double-dutch.description:
Double Dutch was originally developed by Gerrit from Magus Genetics in the first decade of the 21st century. Double Dutch is a stable cross between a Warlock male and a pre-2000 Chronic female.

During the vegetative growth, Double Dutch shows its Indica side with its wide leaves, heavy stem and a bushy growth pattern. During the flowering stage Double Dutch produces giant Sativa-like buds, like its mother the Chronic strain. All tips of the plant that receive sufficient light will form huge dense buds similar to elongated popcorn balls. Double Dutch side-branches must be staked due to their extraordinary heavy weight.

This variety performs well in bio, coco and hydro mediums. The Double Dutch aroma is similar to a pleasant fruity wildflower scent. The effect while smoking is complex and strong; the cerebral high and pleasant bodily effect presented this plant with several awards. In combination with its huge yield this strain is a must try for all Serious growers.

kali-bubba.name: KaliBubba
kali-bubba.description:
Kali Bubba is an mostly sativa from Serious Seeds and can be cultivated indoors, outdoors and greenhouse (Where the plants will need a flowering time of ±74 days) Serious Seeds's Kali Bubba also available as feminized seeds.
Serious Seeds Description

+ **Genetics: Kali Mist** x Bubble Gum
+ **Flowering:** 70-77 days
+ **Outdoor Harvest Time:** November
+ **Yield:** 350-500g/m²

kali-mist.name: Kali Mist
kali-mist.description:
Kali Mist is an mostly sativa from Serious Seeds and can be cultivated indoors, outdoors and greenhouse (Where the plants will need a flowering time of ±80 days) Serious Seeds's Kali Mist is/was never available as feminized seeds.
Serious Seeds Description

+ **Indoor clone grow time:** 1-5 days
+ **Indoor flowering period:** 70-90 days
+ **Indoor yield:** 300-500 g/m²
+ **Harvest Date Outdoor:** middle - end of November

Arguably the top sativa strain available today. With 90% sativa genetices, Kali Mist grows into tall, running, classically sativa plants with very few leaves. This strain produces dense clusters of full fluffy buds, producing much higher yields than you would expect. The plant structure and few leaves allow the light to pass all the way to lower branches, allowing bottom buds to develop fully. When planted outside early in the year this plant can grow very tall. Expect spiraling flowers with a high resin content and a delightfully spicy scent.

Kali Mist is often the choice of experts for their own stash grows. Also, particularly women seem to like this strain, next to the sheer pleasure of smoking it, we received several reports that it works great against menstrual cramps.

We are proud to announce that Kali Mist was improved in 2000 to produce bigger yields. In Spain it proved to be very mold resistent, even outside during bad weather. This strain has flavor and subtle cerebral effect that gave it a Cannabis Cup first prize in 1995 (Hydro Cup) and again (with this new and improved version) in 2000 (Seed Company Sativa Cup)! Without a doubt the choice for connoisseur stash. Gives a very strong, clear and energizing High.

motivation.name: Motavation
motivation.description:
This short/squad-growing Indica plant is the final creation of a long process of development by Magus Genetics. The project combined Sensi Star and the Warlock strain into the ideal indoor plant; during development the genetic lines had names like Starwarz, Medizin Power and London Memories. 

A very thick layer of resin glands on the flowers and sugar leaves, makes manucuring less necessary, and gives her a popular presence in every growroom. Excellent variety for indoor and closet rooms with limited height. A powerful aroma, sweet with undertones reminding of fresh paint, developes during the flowering period.

The effect after smoking Motavation is an overwhelming body stonedness, nailing you to the couch while your mind is fueled with a lot of creative ideas. Executing those ideas however will have to wait until the effects wear off. Any 'boring' or 'depressed' feelings will fall away after a hit of Motavation! This plant has strong medicinal properties for pain-relief and relaxation. Motavation has won its most recent award in September 2013 at the Expogrow-Cup in Irun, Spain. It won FIRST PLACE in the category Indica!

seriosa.name: Seriosa
seriosa.description:
Seriosa is the result of crossing an outstanding 'AK47' with our best 'Serious Mimosa'. Most plants from those seeds do not form a bushy shape but rather have 1 main stem with few shorter side branches on the lowest knots. The buds are grouped along the main stem opposite of each other, with the main bud being the biggest. This is the Mimosa type pheno. Other plants tend to have bigger buds from their AK47 parent. This pheno seems to be more present in the regular seeds (the promo seeds we give away are feminized).

All buds have a lot of crystals, or trichomes. This applies also to the single small leaves sticking out from the buds. Buds of the more Mimosa type pheno are compact, round, and of medium size. While plants with a more AK47 strain structure have bigger and more elongated buds. Flowering time is max. 8 weeks with some faster ones.

Towards the end more than half of the plants show beautiful lila and purple colors in the leaves and in the tops. They do not come from stimulation by low temperatures, but rather from the ripening up of the plants. This coloration seems to be more prominent in feminized than in the regular seeds.

All Seriosa plants are high in THC with almost no CBD. The odour and taste of the Seriosa form a line with two ends. The fruitiness of the Mimosa on one side of the spectrum and the more sweetish spiceyness of AK47 on the other side. Individual plants take different positions somewhere on the line of this spectrum.

The description above is the reason why we want our customers to get a whiff of the 'Seriosa'.

After our customers have trialed and tested the Seriosa seeds we gave as promo, enough people liked them for us to decide to put Seriosa on the menu. Thanks to you, our valued customer, for deciding which seeds are here to stay. We want Serious Seeds to only sell the best seeds

seriotica.name: Seriotica
seriotica.description:
Seriotica is the result of crossing our Serious' Mimosa with Cookies. Seriotica strain is easy to grow and a delight to use. It’s a sophisticated, multi-layered strain that gives high potency, high yield, and a whole lot more. 

All 'Seriotica' plants have a similar structure; short and sturdy with several side branches. All branches are firm and can carry the weight of the buds till the end. Buds are dense and roundish with not too many small leaves sticking out. All buds, small leaves and even bigger leaves and stems are sugarcoated in a thick layer of trichomes. 'Seriotica' has a good resistancy against grey molds and mildew.

THC levels of around 25-28% give a strong effect but is never completely sedating or stupefying. People who prefer a sativa type of effect could harvest around 37 days of flowering. Longer flowering up till 58 days leads to a stronger and more indica-effect. Leaves and buds will show more colors like pink, crimson and purple towards the end of flowering. Plants vary in terpene profile but are always delicious in taste and scent. Not only living plants, but harvested and dried buds will also retain the rich delicious scent very well. It is hard to choose which plant you like the best.

serious-6.name: Serious 6
serious-6.description:
Plants have a short flowering period for a sativa, only 8 weeks and producing compact, not too leafy buds fully covered with a coat of resin crystals. The smell and taste is somewhat like citronella.

+ **Indoor clone grow time:** 5 - 10 days
+ **Indoor flowering time:** 56 - 58 days (8 weeks)
+ **Indoor yield:** 350 - 500 grams/m²
+ **Outside / Greenhouse harvest time:** Mid. September

serious-happiness.name: Serious Happiness
serious-happiness.description:
Two legends were crossed to produce the Serious Happiness strain. We combined our famous Warlock strain (father) with our legendary AK-47 strain (mother) and the result gave us pure happiness! In fact this hybrid brings happiness TWICE. 

First you will be happy about how easy to grow she is. Serious Happiness strain has the perfect hybrid-structure for indoor growing with several side branches not too close together. In flowering each branch grows a very big and dense bud with few leaves, she is easy to manicure!

Her aroma and taste are sweet and fruity, sometimes a bit spicy, with a sugary aftertaste when smoked. That is the moment when she gives pure happiness for the second time. Her effect is a longlasting buzz that combines a nice body-stoned with an incredible head-high, we felt this as pure bliss.

The name Serious Happiness came up after smoking this fantastic strain, because thats exactly how the grower feels, happy while she grows and seriously happy when she is finished. FIRST award won by the Serious Happiness strain: 3rd prize in the category: 'Sativa / Grower' at the IC-420 Cup 2015 in Amsterdam, entered by CLOUDZ.

The yield of this variety is AMAZING! She received the SPECIAL AWARD for the MOST PRODUCTIVE variety at the Master Seedscup 2016 (edition: Outdoor Spain) from YERBA-Magazine.

serious-kush.name: Serious Kush
serious-kush.description:
Our Kush strain is finally here: the serious version of the legendary OG Kush strain! We have taken our world famous White Russian strain and crossed it with an original clone of OG Kush originating from the US. The new cross has the supreme dankness of the OG Kush with the extreme amount of crystals of the White Russian.

We managed to increase the yield of the OG Kush strain substantially, the Serious Kush grows big dense buds covered in trichomes and fills up totally along the branches that receive enough light. 

The aroma is very strong and typically 'kushy'. This variety has that unique kush-flavor, which is so delicious that it lets you crave for more even when you just had a hit. The potency of Serious Kush weed is very strong and she has a strong sedating effect (=couchlock effect), which is ideal for chronic pain patients and patients with problems falling asleep. She is also ideal for relaxing and playing video-games.

A customer who has grown this strain from our retail seeds won the FIRST award for Serious Kush: 3rd place in the category Indica/Grower at the IC420 Cup 2016 in Amsterdam. In June 2018 she was voted EUROPEAN PLANT OF THE YEAR in the category Indica by the readers of Soft Secrets Magazine.

stramberry-ak.name: Strawberry AK
stramberry-ak.description:
King Keil, a German hip-hop artist and a great cannabis lover, participated in the development of this strain. He gave his opinion on the flavours, the effect and other criteria linked to all aspects of its consumption. He was so inspired by the result that he wrote a song dedicated to it, which is on his new Album "Weedman Returns".

This cross between a male Bubble Gum and a AK-47 female produces Sativa dominant plants that flourish quickly. They can be harvested after 65 days at the most.

Strawberry Akeil develops several secondary branches, making it perfect for SCROG crops. The buds are covered with resin. This variety is a perfect choice for resin extractions.

This variety combines the powerful effect and huge resin production of the AK-47 with the delicious fruity strawberry aroma and taste of the Bubble Gum.

The Strawberry-AKeil is recommended for chronic pain, insomnia and stress in general. The effect is mentally positive and stimulating with profound physical relaxation

### Serious Seeds Strawberry Akeil info:
+ **Genetics:** AK47 x Bubble Gum (Sativa dominant hybrid)
+ **Recommended growth time:** 4-5 weeks
+ **Indoor flowering:** 56-63 days
+ **Indoor yield:** 400/500g per m2
+ **Outdoor harvest:** Early-mid October

warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.description:
The Warlock is indica dominant but it also has some characteristics that are considered sativa by most people (elongation at flowering, active high, high calyx/leaf ratio). It is a branchy plant that will form only a few medium sized leaves and a massive amount of flowers so it is easy to manicure. The pistils are clear white when fresh, changing to tan/pink when mature. The smell is strong and sweet, some even a bit sour (like fresh fruit). The high is mainly cerebral.

+ **Genetics:** Skunk No. 1 x Afghani
+ **AKA:** Afghani Skunk
+ **Variety:** Mostly Indica
+ **Type:** F1 Hybrid
+ **Harvest Date:** 8-9 weeks
+ **Flowering Period:** October / November
+ **THC Content:** 20+%
+ **Characteristics:** Easy to manicure

white-russian.name: White Russian
white-russian.description:
The plants yield very powerful buds, coated with resin. Very strong, long lasting High, more cerebral than a knockout. Medicinal plant.

These seeds can produce plants that are fantastic in both appearance, and effect. One of the most typically indica strains, White Russian is a stable cross of AK-47 and White Widow (a prize winning indica clone). Medium height, consistent plants and dense, very resinous flower tops (crystals appear after about 5 weeks of flowering). With such a strong indica background, the plants smell quite strong during both their growth and flowering period.

+ **Indoor clone grow time:** 5-10 days
+ **Indoor flowering period:** 53-63 days
+ **Indoor yield:** 350-500 g/m²
+ **Outdoor harvest time:** middle - end of October
